sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁחלת

Transliteration: shechêleth

Phonetic: shekh-ay'-leth

BDB Definition:

  1. onycha
    1. an ingredient used in the holy incense

Origin: apparently from the same as H7826 through some obscure idea, perhaps that of peeling off by concussion of sound

TWOT entry: 2363b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
